label: Adjustments for accrued income (expenses) not yet received (paid)
label_normalized: adjustments for accrued income (expenses) not yet received (paid)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the accrued expenses (income) not yet paid (received) during the period.

label: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in inventories
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for decrease (increase) in inventories.Inventories are assets:a. held for sale in the ordinary course of      business;b. in the process of production for such sale; orc. in the form of materials or supplies to be    consumed in the production process or in the    rendering of services.

label: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in other operating receivables
label_normalized: adjustments for decrease (increase) in other operating receivables
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for decrease (increase) in other operating receivables.

label: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in trade accounts receivable
label_normalized: adjustments for decrease (increase) in trade accounts receivable
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for decrease (increase) in trade accounts receivable.

label: Adjustments for fair value losses (gains)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of fair value losses (gains) recognised as expenses (income) during the period.

label: Adjustments for finance costs
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for finance cost which refers to interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments for income tax expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to income tax expense.Income tax is all domestic and foreign taxes that are based on taxable profits. Income tax also includes taxes, such as withholding taxes, that are payable by a subsidiary, associate or joint venture on distributions to the reporting entity.

label: Adjustments for increase (decrease) in other operating payables
label_normalized: adjustments for increase (decrease) in other operating payables
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period of adjustments for decrease (increase) in other operating receivables.

label: Adjustments for increase (decrease) in trade accounts payable
label_normalized: adjustments for increase (decrease) in trade accounts payable
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period of adjustments for decrease (increase) in trade accounts payable.

label: Adjustments for non-cash finance costs
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for non-cash finance costs which refers to interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments for non-cash income tax expense
label_normalized: adjustments for non-cash income tax expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for non-cash income tax expense.

label: Adjustments for provisions
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of provisions recognised as expenses during the period.Provision is a liability of uncertain timing or amount.

label: Adjustments to reconcile profit (loss)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of adjustments to reconcile profit or loss.

label: Adjustments for share-based payments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of share-based payments recognised as expenses during the period.

label: Adjustments for unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains)
label_normalized: adjustments for unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains) recognised as expenses (income) during the period.

label: Administrative expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of administrative expenses which are expenses of providing management and administration for the business.

label: Amounts payable
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, for amounts payable to related parties.

label: Amounts receivable
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, for amounts receivable from related parties.

label: Assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of assets held by the reporting entity.An asset is a resource controlled by the entity as a result of past events and from which future economic benefits are expected to flow to the entity.

label: Balances with banks
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of money held in a bank account at a given moment.

label: Bank overdrafts
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured debit balances of the current account.

label: Other banking arrangements
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other banking arrangements not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Biological assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of a biological asset which consist of living animal or plant.

label: Loans and borrowings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of outstanding funds held that the entity is obligated to repay.

label: Buildings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of building.

label: Cash
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of cash.

label: Cash advances and loans made to other parties, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: cash advances and loans made to other parties, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting  period, of cash advances and loans made to other parties (other than advances and loans of a financial institution) which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
label_normalized: cash and cash equivalents at end of period
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of cash comprises of cash on hand and demand deposits and cash equivalents which are short-term, highly liquid investments that are readily convertible to known amounts of cash and that are subject to an insignificant risk of changes in value.

label: Cash equivalents
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of cash equivalents.

label: Proceeds from disposal of subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash flows from losing control of subsidiaries or other businesses. Subsidiary is an entity, including an unincorporated entity such as a partnership, that is controlled by another entity (known as the parent).

label: Cash flows from (used in) financing activities
label_normalized: cash flows from (used in) financing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the net cash flow from (used in) financing activities.Financing activities are activities that result in changes in the size and composition of the contributed equity and borrowings of an entity.

label: Cash flows from (used in) investing activities
label_normalized: cash flows from (used in) investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the net cash flow from (used in) investing activities.Investing activities are the acquisition and disposal of long-term assets and other investments not included in cash equivalents.

label: Cash flows from (used in) operating activities
label_normalized: cash flows from (used in) operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period,of the net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.Operating activities are the principal revenue-producing activities of the entity and other activities that are not investing or financing activities.

label: Acquisition and subscription of shares in subsidiaries
label_normalized: acquisition and subscription of shares in subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, cash flows used in obtaining control of subsidiaries or other businesses. Subsidiary is an entity, including an unincorporated entity such as a partnership, that is controlled by another entity (known as the parent).

label: Cash in hand
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of money and notes, kept to pay small amounts but not deposited in the bank.

label: Cash payments for futures contracts, forward contracts, option contracts and swap contracts, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: cash payments for futures contracts, forward contracts, option contracts and swap contracts, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting  period, of cash payments for futures contracts, forward contracts, option contracts and swap contracts which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Cash receipts from futures contracts, forward contracts, option contracts and swap contracts, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: cash receipts from futures contracts, forward contracts, option contracts and swap contracts, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting  period, cash receipts from futures contracts, forward contracts, option contracts and swap contracts which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Cash receipts from repayment of advances and loans made to other parties, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: cash receipts from repayment of advances and loans made to other parties, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting  period, of cash receipts from repayment of advances and loans made to other parties (other than advances and loans of a financial institution) which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Increase (decrease) in equity
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of increase (decrease) in equity.

label: Decrease (increase) in inventories of finished goods and work in progress
label_normalized: decrease (increase) in inventories of finished goods and work in progress
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the changes in inventories of finished goods and work in progress. Changes in inventories are measured by the value of the entries into inventories less the value of withdrawals and less the value of any recurrent losses of goods held in inventories during the accounting period. Some of these acquisitions and disposals are attributable to actual purchases or sales, but others reflect transactions that are internal to the enterprise.Changes in inventories (including work-in- progress) consist of changes in: a. stocks of outputs that are still held by the units that     produced them prior to their being further processed, sold,     delivered to other units or used in other ways; and b. stocks of products acquired from other units that are     intended to be used for intermediate consumption or for     resale without further processing; they are measured by     the value of the entries into inventories less the value of     withdrawals and the value of any recurrent losses of goods     held in inventories.

label: Share capital [member]
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares.

label: Comprehensive income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of total comprehensive income which refers to the change in equity during a period resulting from transactions and other events, other than those changes resulting from transactions with owners in their capacity as owners (equal to the sum of profit or loss and other comprehensive income).

label: Comprehensive income, attributable to non-controlling interests
label_normalized: comprehensive income, attributable to non-controlling interests
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests.

label: Comprehensive income, attributable to owners of parent
label_normalized: comprehensive income, attributable to owners of parent
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of comprehensive income attributable to the owners of the parent.

label: Construction in progress/Asset work-in progress
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of long-term asset account in which the costs of constructing long-term assets are recorded.

label: Copyrights, patents and other industrial property rights, service and operating rights
label_normalized: copyrights, patents and other industrial property rights, service and operating rights
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the exclusive and assignable legal right, given to the originator for a fixed number of years, to print, publish, perform, film, or record literary, artistic, or musical material and rights or titles for a set period, especially the sole right to exclude others from making, using, or selling an invention.

label: Cost of sales
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of when inventories are sold, the entity shall recognise the carrying amount of those inventories as an expense in the period in which the related revenue is recognised.

label: Current assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current assets held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify an asset as current when:a. it expects to realise the asset, or intends to sell or      consume it, in the entity's normal operating cycle;b. it holds the asset primarily for the purpose of trading; c. it expects to realise the asset within twelve months after      the reporting date; ord. the asset is cash or a cash equivalent, unless it is restricted      from being exchanged or used to settle a liability for at      least twelve months after the reporting date.

label: Current liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current liabilities held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify a liability as current when:a. it expects to settle the liability in the entity’s normal      operating cycle;b. it holds the liability primarily for the purpose of trading;c. the liability is due to be settled within twelve months after     the reporting date; ord. the entity does not have an unconditional right to defer     settlement of the liability for at least twelve months after     reporting date.

label: Provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of provision only when:a. the entity has an obligation at the reporting date as a result of a past event;b. it is probable (i.e. more likely than not) that the entity will be required to transfer economic benefits in settlement; andc. the amount of the obligation can be estimated reliably.

label: Employee benefits
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of employee benefits which are all forms of consideration given by the reporting entity in exchange for service rendered by employees or for the termination of employment.

label: Current tax assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amount of income tax recoverable in respect of the tax loss for the current period or past periods.

label: Current tax assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amount of income tax recoverable in respect of the tax loss for the current period or past periods.

label: Current tax liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of  the amount of current income tax payable in respect of the taxable profit for the current period or past periods.

label: Current tax liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of  the amount of current income tax payable in respect of the taxable profit for the current period or past periods.

label: Deferred income
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of deferred income.

label: Deferred income
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of advance payments for products or services that are to be delivered in the future.

label: Deferred tax assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amounts of income tax recoverable in future periods in respect of:a. deductible temporary differences;b. the carryforward of unused tax losses; andc. the carryforward of unused tax credits.

label: Deferred tax liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amounts of income tax payable in future periods in respect of taxable temporary differences.

label: Depreciation and amortisation expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of depreciation and amortisation expense which is the systematic allocation of the depreciable amount of an asset over its useful life.

label: Depreciation of property, plant and equipment
label_normalized: depreciation of property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of depreciation of property, plant and equipment. The systematic allocation of the depreciable amount of an asset over its useful life.

label: Description of accounting policy for investment in associates [text block]
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for investment in associates
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to investment in associates.

label: Description of accounting policy for investments in joint ventures [text block]
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for investments in joint ventures
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to investments in joint ventures.

label: Description of accounting policy for inventories [text block]
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for inventories
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to inventories.

label: Description of accounting policy for revenue and other income [text block]
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for revenue and other income
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to revenue and other income.

label: Disclosure of changes in accounting policies, accounting estimates and errors [text block]
label_normalized: disclosure of changes in accounting policies, accounting estimates and errors
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of changes in accounting policies, accounting estimates and errors.

label: Disclosure of issued capital [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of ordinary share capital issued.

label: Disclosure of effect of changes in foreign exchange rates [text block]
label_normalized: disclosure of effect of changes in foreign exchange rates
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of effect of changes in foreign exchange rates.

label: Disclosure of first-time adoption [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of first-time adoption.

label: Disclosure of general information about financial statements [text block]
label_normalized: disclosure of general information about financial statements
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of general information about financial statements.

label: Disclosure of income tax expense [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of income tax expense.

label: Disclosure of inventories [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of inventories.

label: Disclosure of investment property [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of investment property.

label: Disclosure of leases [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of operating and finance leases.

label: Disclosure of property, plant and equipment [text block]
label_normalized: disclosure of property, plant and equipment
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of property, plant and equipment.

label: Disclosure of revenue [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of revenue.

label: Disclosure of share capital [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of share capital.

label: Disclosure of share-based payment arrangements [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of share-based payment arrangements, which includes equity-settled share-based payment and cash-settled share-based payment arrangement.

label: Disclosure of significant accounting policies [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of significant accounting policies.

label: Disclosure of related parties [text block]
definition: A related party transaction is a transfer of resources, services or obligations between a reporting entity and a related party, regardless of whether a price is charged. Examples of related party transactions that are common to private entities include, but are not limited to:a. transactions between an entity and its principal owner(s);b. transactions between an entity and another entity when both entities are under the common control of a single entity or person; andc. transactions in which an entity or person that controls the reporting entity incurs expenses directly that otherwise would have been borne by the reporting entity.

label: Dividends paid
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of dividend paid which refers to the distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital.

label: Dividends paid, classified as financing activities
label_normalized: dividends paid, classified as financing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for dividends which are distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Dividends paid, classified as operating activities
label_normalized: dividends paid, classified as operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for dividends which are distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

label: Dividends received, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: dividends received, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from dividends which are distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Dividends received, classified as operating activities
label_normalized: dividends received, classified as operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from dividends which are distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

label: Effect of exchange rate changes on cash and cash equivalents
label_normalized: effect of exchange rate changes on cash and cash equivalents
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of effect of exchange rate changes on cash and cash equivalents. An entity shall recognise, in profit or loss in the period in which they arise, exchange differences arising on the settlement of monetary items or on translating monetary items at rates different from those at which they were translated on initial recognition during the period or in previous periods.

label: Employee benefits expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of employee benefits expenses.

label: Entity's total for related parties [member]
definition: This member stands for sum of components of related parties.

label: Equity
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of equity. Equity is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities.

label: Equity and liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of equity and liabilities held by the reporting entity. Equity is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities. A liability is a present obligation of the entity arising from past events, the settlement of which is expected to result in an outflow from the entity of resources embodying economic benefits.

label: Equity attributable to owners
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of equity attributable to owners of parent.

label: Equity attributable to owners of parent [member]
label_normalized: equity attributable to owners of parent
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the sum of equity attributable to owners.

label: Equity [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity which is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities.

label: Finance costs
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of finance cost which refers to interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds.

label: Finance income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of finance income which is income that were derived from the entity's financial assets.

label: Net fair value gain on derivatives
label_normalized: net fair value gain on derivatives
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net fair value gain on derivatives which is a gain or loss on a financial liability that is designated as at fair value through profit or loss in the remaining amount of change in the fair value of the liability which shall be presented in profit or loss.

label: Goodwill
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the future economic benefits arising from assets that are not capable of being individually identified and separately recognised.

label: Gross profit
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gross profit which is revenue earned by an entity less the cost of achieving the sales during the reporting period. These costs are essentially direct costs such as wages and raw materials.

label: (Reversal of)/Impairment loss on intangible assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of (reversal of)/impairment loss on intangible assets recognised as (income) expenses during the period.

label: (Reversal of)/Impairment loss on property, plant and equipment
label_normalized: (reversal of)/impairment loss on property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of (reversal of)/impairment loss on property, plant and equipment recognised as (income)  expenses during the period.

label: Tax expense
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount included in total comprehensive income or equity for the reporting period in respect of current tax and deferred tax.

label: Income taxes paid (refund), classified as operating activities
label_normalized: income taxes paid (refund), classified as operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of income tax which refers to all domestic and foreign taxes that are based on taxable profits. Income tax also includes taxes, such as withholding taxes, that are payable by a subsidiary, associate or joint venture on distributions to the reporting entity.

label: Increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents
label_normalized: increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the net increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents.CashCash on hand and demand deposits.Cash equivalentShort-term, highly liquid investments that are readily convertible to known amounts of cash and that are subject to an insignificant risk of changes in value.

label: Increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents before effect of exchange rate changes
label_normalized: increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents before effect of exchange rate changes
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the net increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents before effect of exchange rate changes.CashCash on hand and demand deposits.Cash equivalentShort-term, highly liquid investments that are readily convertible to known amounts of cash and that are subject to an insignificant risk of changes in value.

label: Increase (decrease) through share-based payment transactions, equity
label_normalized: increase (decrease) through share-based payment transactions, equity
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of changes in equity resulting from share-based payment transactions.A share-based payment transaction in which the entitya. receives goods or services as consideration for its own equity instruments including shares or share options), orb. receives goods or services but has no obligation to settle the transaction with the supplier.

label: Increase (decrease) through other changes, equity
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of changes in equity resulting from other changes not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Treasury shares transactions
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of treasury shares transactions. An entity shall deduct from equity the fair value of the consideration given for the treasury shares.

label: Intangible assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of intangible assets and goodwill.

label: Intangible assets other than goodwill
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of intangible assets other than goodwill.

label: Interest paid, classified as financing activities
label_normalized: interest paid, classified as financing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts paid by the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Interest paid, classified as operating activities
label_normalized: interest paid, classified as operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts paid by the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

label: Interest received, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: interest received, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Interest received, classified as operating activities
label_normalized: interest received, classified as operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

label: Inventories
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of inventories which are:a. held for sale in the ordinary course of business;b. in the process of production for such sale; orc. in the form of materials or supplies to be consumed in the production process or in the rendering of services.

label: Investment properties
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of  properties (land or a building, or part of a building, or both) held by the owner or by the lessee under a finance lease to earn rentals or for capital appreciation or both, instead of for:a. use in the production or supply of goods or services or for administrative purposes; orb. sale in the ordinary course of business.

label: Investments in associates
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investment in entities, including an unincorporated entity such as a partnership, over which the investor has significant influence and that is neither a subsidiary nor an interest in a joint venture.

label: Investments in joint ventures
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of a contractual arrangement whereby two or more parties undertake an economic activity that is subject to joint control. Joint ventures can take the form of jointly controlled operations, jointly controlled assets or jointly controlled entities.

label: Issuance of shares
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of issuance of shares which refers to the new allotment of shares during the reporting period.

label: Issued capital
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of ordinary share capital issued. An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

label: Issued capital [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount of ordinary shares issued. An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

label: Key management personnel compensation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of key management personnel compensation. Key management personnel are those persons having authority and responsibility for planning, directing and controlling the activities of the entity, directly or indirectly, including any director (whether executive or otherwise) of that entity.

label: Key management personnel of entity or parent [member]
label_normalized: key management personnel of entity or parent
definition: This member stands for a component in the form of key management personnel. Key management personnel are those persons having authority andresponsibility for planning, directing and controlling the activities of the entity, directly or indirectly, including any director (whether executive or otherwise) of that entity.

label: Land
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of land.

label: Land and buildings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of land and building.

label: Legal proceedings provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of present obligation as a result of a past obligating event - on the basis of the evidence available and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable.

label: Liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of liabilities held by the reporting entity.A liability is a present obligation of the entity arising from past events, the settlement of which is expected to result in an outflow from the entity of resources embodying economic benefits.

label: Legal proceedings provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of present obligation as a result of a past obligating event - on the basis of the evidence available and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable.

label: Other non-current provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current provisions not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Onerous contracts provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of a contract in which the unavoidable costs of meeting the obligations under the contract exceed the economic benefits expected to be received under it.

label: Restructuring provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of a programme that is planned and controlled by management and materially changes either the scope of a business undertaken by an entity or the manner in which that business is conducted.

label: Warranty provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the legal obligation as a result of the sale of the product with a warranty and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable for the warranties as a whole.

label: Machinery
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of machines collectively.

label: Non-controlling interests
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of equity in a subsidiary not attributable, directly or indirectly, to a parent.

label: Non-controlling interests [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the equity in a subsidiary not attributable, directly or indirectly, to a parent.

label: Non-current assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current assets held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify an asset as current when:a. it expects to realise the asset, or intends to sell or consume it, in the entity's normal operating cycle;b. it holds the asset primarily for the purpose of trading; c. it expects to realise the asset within twelve months after the reporting date; ord. the asset is cash or a cash equivalent, unless it is restricted from being exchanged or used to settle a liability for at least twelve months after the reporting date.An entity shall classify all other assets as non-current.

label: Non-current liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current liabilities held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify a liability as current when:a. it expects to settle the liability in the entity’s normal operating cycle;b. it holds the liability primarily for the purpose of trading;c. the liability is due to be settled within twelve months after the reporting date; ord. the entity does not have an unconditional right to defer settlement of the liability for at least twelve months after reporting date.An entity shall classify all other liabilities as non-current.

label: Trade and other non-current payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of amount billed to a company by its suppliers for goods delivered to or services consumed by the company in the ordinary course of business and other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses

label: Non-current trade payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current trade payables.

label: Provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of a provision only when:a. the entity has an obligation at the reporting date as a result of a past event;b. it is probable (i.e. more likely than not) that the entity will be required to transfer economic benefits in settlement; andc. the amount of the obligation can be estimated reliably.

label: Employee benefits
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of employee benefits which are all forms of consideration given by the reporting entity in exchange for service rendered by employees, including directors and management.

label: Trade and other non-current receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of amounts billed by the reporting entity to its customers when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business and  various forms of non-trade receivables which do not generally result from the operations of the business.

label: Number of shares issued and fully paid
label_normalized: number of shares issued and fully paid
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the number of shares issued and fully paid.

label: Number of shares issued but not fully paid
label_normalized: number of shares issued but not fully paid
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the number of shares issued but not fully paid.

label: Number of shares outstanding
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares outstanding.

label: Onerous contracts provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of a contract in which the unavoidable costs of meeting the obligations under the contract exceed the economic benefits expected to be received under it.

label: Other adjustments for non-cash items
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other non-cash items not reported elsewhere in the statement to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Other adjustments for which cash effects are investing or financing cash flow
label_normalized: other adjustments for which cash effects are investing or financing cash flow
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other adjustments for which cash effects are investing or financing cash flow not reported elsewhere in the statement to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Other adjustments to reconcile profit (loss)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for other adjustments to reconcile profit (loss) not reported elsewhere in the statement to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Other cash and cash equivalents
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other cash and cash equivalents not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other cash payments from operating activities
label_normalized: other cash payments from operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the aggregate of other cash payments from operating activities which can't be categorised into any of the other category above.

label: Other cash payments to acquire equity or debt instruments of other entities, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: other cash payments to acquire equity or debt instruments of other entities, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, other cash payments to acquire equity or debt instruments of other entities.A financial instrument is a contract that gives rise to a financial asset of one entity and a financial liability or equity instrument of another entity.

label: Acquisition and subscription of shares in joint ventures
label_normalized: acquisition and subscription of shares in joint ventures
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, other cash payments to acquire interests in joint ventures.A joint venture is a contractual arrangement whereby two or more parties undertake an economic activity that is subject to joint control. Joint ventures can take the form of jointly controlled operations, jointly controlled assets or jointly controlled entities.

label: Other cash receipts from operating activities
label_normalized: other cash receipts from operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the aggregate of other cash receipts from operating activities which can't be categorised into any of the other category above.

label: Other cash receipts from sales of equity or debt instruments of other entities, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: other cash receipts from sales of equity or debt instruments of other entities, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, other cash receipts from sales of equity or debt instruments of other entities.A financial instrument is a contract that gives rise to a financial asset of one entity and a financial liability or equity instrument of another entity.

label: Proceeds from disposal of joint ventures
label_normalized: proceeds from disposal of joint ventures
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, other cash receipts from sales of interests in joint ventures.A joint venture is a contractual arrangement whereby two or more parties undertake an economic activity that is subject to joint control. Joint ventures can take the form of jointly controlled operations, jointly controlled assets or jointly controlled entities.

label: Other comprehensive income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other comprehensive income which comprises the items of income and expense (including reclassification adjustments) that are not recognised in profit or loss as required or permitted by this Standard.

label: Other comprehensive income, before tax, actuarial gains (losses) on defined benefit plans
label_normalized: other comprehensive income, before tax, actuarial gains (losses) on defined benefit plans
definition: Report the value, for the reporting  period, of actuarial gain/ (loss) on employee benefit obligation.An entity is required to recognise all actuarial gains and losses in the period in which they occur. An entity shall:(a) recognise all actuarial gains and losses in profit or loss; or(b) recognise all actuarial gains and losses in other comprehensive income.as an accounting policy election. The entity shall apply its chosen accounting policy consistently to all of its defined benefit plans and all of its actuarial gains and losses. Actuarial gains and losses recognised in other comprehensive income shall be presented in the statement of comprehensive income.

label: Other comprehensive income, before tax, exchange differences on translation
label_normalized: other comprehensive income, before tax, exchange differences on translation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of foreign currency translation differences for foreign operations.The exchange differences result from:a. translating income and expenses at the exchange rates at the dates of the transactions and assets and liabilities at the closing rate; andb. translating the opening net assets at a closing rate that     differs from the previous closing rate.

label: Other comprehensive income, before tax, gains (losses) on revaluation
label_normalized: other comprehensive income, before tax, gains (losses) on revaluation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of change in revaluation surplus.If an asset’s carrying amount is increased as a result of a revaluation, the increase shall be recognised in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus

label: Other comprehensive income, net of tax, actuarial gains (losses) on defined benefit plans
label_normalized: other comprehensive income, net of tax, actuarial gains (losses) on defined benefit plans
definition: Report the value, for the reporting  period, of actuarial gain/ (loss) on employee benefit obligation.An entity is required to recognise all actuarial gains and losses in the period in which they occur. An entity shall:(a) recognise all actuarial gains and losses in profit or loss; or(b) recognise all actuarial gains and losses in other comprehensive income.as an accounting policy election. The entity shall apply its chosen accounting policy consistently to all of its defined benefit plans and all of its actuarial gains and losses. Actuarial gains and losses recognised in other comprehensive income shall be presented in the statement of comprehensive income.

label: Other comprehensive income, net of tax, exchange differences on translation
label_normalized: other comprehensive income, net of tax, exchange differences on translation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of foreign currency translation differences for foreign operations.The exchange differences result from:a. translating income and expenses at the exchange rates at the dates of the transactions and assets and liabilities at the closing rate; andb. translating the opening net assets at a closing rate that     differs from the previous closing rate.

label: Other comprehensive income, net of tax, gains (losses) on revaluation
label_normalized: other comprehensive income, net of tax, gains (losses) on revaluation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of changes in revaluation surplus.If an asset’s carrying amount is increased as a result of a revaluation, the increase shall be recognised in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus

label: Other employee benefit expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other employee expenses not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other expenses which refers to expenses not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Other expenses, by nature
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other expenses which refers to expenses not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Other income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of income for the reporting entity that comes from anything other than its ordinary operations. Other income includes items such as interest from the reporting entity's bank accounts, profit from the sale of a fixed asset, and so forth. Other income is not recurring and, as a result, is not included in some calculations of profit or loss.

label: Other cash inflows (outflows) from financing activities
label_normalized: other cash inflows (outflows) from financing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other cash inflows or outflows not reported elsewhere in the statement, which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Other cash inflows (outflows) from investing activities
label_normalized: other cash inflows (outflows) from investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other cash inflows or outflows not reported elsewhere in the statement, which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Other cash inflows (outflows) from operating activities
label_normalized: other cash inflows (outflows) from operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other cash inflows or outflows not reported elsewhere in the statement, which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

label: Other intangible assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of an identifiable non-monetary asset without physical substance. Such an asset is identifiable when:a. it is separable, i.e. capable of being separated or divided from the entity and sold, transferred, licensed, rented or exchanged, either individually or together with a related contract, asset or liability; orb. it arises from contractual or other legal rights, regardless of whether those rights are transferable or separable from the entity or from other rights and obligations.

label: Other long-term employee benefits
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other long-term employee benefits expenses during the reporting period. Other long-term employee benefits generally include, for example:a. long-term compensated absences such as long-service or sabbatical leave;b. long-service benefits;c. long-term disability benefits;d. profit-sharing and bonuses payable twelve months or more after the end of the period in which the employees render the related service; ande. deferred compensation paid twelve months or more after the end of the period in which it is earned.

label: Other property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other property, plant and equipment not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other provisions not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other related parties [member]
definition: This member stands for a component in the form of other related parties not reported elsewhere in the other categories.

label: Reserves
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of distributable and non-distributable reserves.

label: Reserves [Member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the total amount of distributable and non-distributable reserves.

label: Other revenue
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other revenue not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other short-term employee benefits
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other short-term employee benefits expenses during the reporting period. Short-term employee benefits generally include items such as:a. wages, salaries and social security contributions;b. short-term compensated absences (such as paid annual leave and paid sick leave) when the absences are expected to occur within twelve months after the end of the period in which the employees render the related employee service;c. profit-sharing and bonuses payable within twelve months after the end of the period in which the employees render the related service; andd. non-monetary benefits (such as medical care, housing, cars and free or subsidised goods or services) for current employees.

label: Other current provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current provisions not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Payments of finance lease liabilities, classified as financing activities
label_normalized: payments of finance lease liabilities, classified as financing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments of finance lease liabilities which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Payments to acquire other equity instruments
label_normalized: payments to acquire other equity instruments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to acquire other equity instruments which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities. A financial instrument is a contract that gives rise to a financial asset of one entity and a financial liability or equity instrument of another entity.

label: Payments to acquire or redeem entity's shares
label_normalized: payments to acquire or redeem entity's shares
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to repurchase and redemption of entity's shares which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Payments to and on behalf of employees
label_normalized: payments to and on behalf of employees
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to and on behalf of employees which includes expenses paid by the employees on behalf of the entity and personal expenses paid by the entity for the employees.

label: Payments to suppliers for goods and services
label_normalized: payments to suppliers for goods and services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for goods and services acquired by the entity from third parties (suppliers).

label: Defined benefit plans
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the post-employment benefit expense  during the reporting period in relation to defined benefit plans. Defined benefit plans are post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans.

label: Defined contribution plans
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the post-employment benefit expense  during the reporting period in relation to defined contribution plans. Defined contribution plans are post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and has no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions or to make direct benefit payments to employees if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods.

label: Proceeds from borrowings, classified as financing activities
label_normalized: proceeds from borrowings, classified as financing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from short-term and long-term borrowings which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Proceeds from issuing other equity instruments
label_normalized: proceeds from issuing other equity instruments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from issuing other equity instruments which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities. A financial instrument is a contract that gives rise to a financial asset of one entity and a financial liability or equity instrument of another entity.

label: Proceeds from issuing shares
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from issuing shares which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Proceeds from sales of other long-term assets, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: proceeds from sales of other long-term assets, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from sales of other long-term assets not reported elsewhere in the report, which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities. An asset is a resource controlled by the entity as a result of past events and from which future economic benefits are expected to flow to the entity.

label: Proceeds from sales of intangible assets, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: proceeds from sales of intangible assets, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from sales of intangible assets which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.An intangible asset is an identifiable non-monetary asset without physical substance. Such an asset is identifiable when:a. it is separable, ie capable of being separated or divided from the entity and sold, transferred, licensed, rented or exchanged, either individually or together with a related contract, asset or liability; orb. it arises from contractual or other legal rights, regardless of whether those rights are transferable or separable from the entity or from other rights and obligations.

label: Proceeds from sales of property, plant and equipment, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: proceeds from sales of property, plant and equipment, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from sales of property, plant and equipment which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.Property, plant and equipment are tangible assets that:a. are held for use in the production or supply of goods or services, for rental to others or for administrative purposes; andb. are expected to be used during more than one period.

label: Profit (loss)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss which is the total of income less expenses, excluding the components of other comprehensive income.

label: Profit (loss), attributable to non-controlling interests
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss allocated to non-controlling interests of the subsidiary during the reporting period.

label: Profit (loss), attributable to owners of parent
label_normalized: profit (loss), attributable to owners of parent
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss attributable to the parent entity, which refers to profit or loss of the consolidated entity after adjusting for non-controlling interests.

label: Profit (loss) before tax, from continuing operations
label_normalized: profit (loss) before tax, from continuing operations
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit before tax which is a profitability measure that looks at an entity's profits before the entity has to pay corporate income tax by deducting all expenses from revenue including interest expenses and operating expenses except for income tax.

label: Profit (loss) from continuing operations
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss from continuing operations which are the after-tax earnings that are generated from operational activities.

label: Profit (loss) before tax, from discontinued operation
label_normalized: profit (loss) before tax, from discontinued operation
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of a  component of an entity that either has been disposed of, or is held for sale, anda. represents a separate major line of business or geographical area of operations;b. is part of a single co-ordinated plan to dispose of a separate major line of business or geographical area of operations; orc. is a subsidiary acquired exclusively with a view to resale.

label: Property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of property, plant and equipment which are tangible assets that:a. are held for use in the production or supply of goods or services, for rental to others, or for administrative purposes; andb. are expected to be used during more than one period.

label: Provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of provisions.Provision is a liability of uncertain timing or amount.

label: Employee benefits
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of employee benefits which are all forms of consideration given by the reporting entity in exchange for service rendered by employees, including directors and management.

label: Purchase of intangible assets, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: purchase of intangible assets, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to acquire intangible assets.An intangible asset is an identifiable non-monetary asset without physical substance. Such an asset is identifiable when:a. it is separable, i.e. capable of being separated or divided from the entity and sold, transferred, licensed, rented or exchanged, either individually or together with a related contract, asset or liability; orb. it arises from contractual or other legal rights, regardless of whether those rights are transferable or separable from the entity or from other rights and obligations.

label: Purchase of other long-term assets, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: purchase of other long-term assets, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to acquire other long-term assets not reported elsewhere in the report, which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities. An asset is a resource controlled by the entity as a result of past events and from which future economic benefits are expected to flow to the entity.

label: Purchase of property, plant and equipment, classified as investing activities
label_normalized: purchase of property, plant and equipment, classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to acquire property, plant and equipment which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities. Property, plant and equipment are tangible assets that:a. are held for use in the production or supply of goods or services, for rental to others or for administrative purposes; andb. are expected to be used during more than one period.

label: Purchases of goods
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for purchase of goods from related parties.

label: Purchases of property and other assets
label_normalized: purchases of property and other assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for purchase of property and other assets from related parties.

label: Raw materials and consumables used
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of raw materials and consumables used. Raw materials are the basic materials from which the products were made, and consumables are commodities that are intended  to be used up relatively quickly.

label: Receipts from royalties, fees, commissions and other revenue
label_normalized: receipts from royalties, fees, commissions and other revenue
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from royalties, fees, commissions and other revenue.The use by others of entity assets gives rise to revenue in the form of:a. interest—charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity;b. royalties—charges for the use of long-term assets of the entity, for example, patents, trademarks, copyrights and computer software; andc. dividends—distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a  particular class of capital.

label: Receipts from sales of goods and rendering of services
label_normalized: receipts from sales of goods and rendering of services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from sales of goods and rendering of services. Goods includes goods produced by the entity for the purpose of sale and goods purchased for resale. The rendering of services typically involves the performance by the entity of a contractually agreed task over an agreed period of time.

label: Repayments of borrowings, classified as financing activities
label_normalized: repayments of borrowings, classified as financing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for the repayments of amounts borrowed which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Research and development expense
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of research which is the original and planned investigation undertaken with the prospect of gaining new scientific or technical knowledge and understanding that has not been capitalised as part of the cost of another asset and development which is the application of research findings or other knowledge to a plan or design for the production of new or substantially improved materials, devices, products, processes, systems or services before the start of commercial production or use.

label: Foreign currency translation reserve
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of exchange differences arising during the period and classified in a separate component of equity at the end of the period.

label: Restructuring provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of a programme that is planned and controlled by management and materially changes either the scope of a business undertaken by an entity or the manner in which that business is conducted.

label: Retained earnings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of the entity's cumulative undistributed earnings or deficit.

label: Retained earnings [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the net profit available for distibution, less any distribution made.

label: Revaluation surplus
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of increase in carrying amount as a result of a revaluation,the increase shall be recognized in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus.

label: Revaluation surplus [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the increase in asset’s carrying amount as a result of a revaluation, the increase shall be recognised in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus.

label: Revenue
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the gross inflow of economic benefits during the period arising in the course of the ordinary activities of an entity when those inflows result in increases in equity, other than increases relating to contributions from equity participants.

label: Dividend income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of dividend income which shall be recognised when the shareholder’s right to receive payment is established.

label: Interest income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the sum of revenue from interest income received.

label: Revenue from rendering of services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of revenue from rendering of services.

label: Revenue from rendering of services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for revenue from rendering of services to related parties.

label: Royalty income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from royalties which refers to charges for the use of long-term assets of the entity, for example, patents, trademarks, copyrights and computer software.

label: Revenue from sale of goods
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of revenue from sale of goods.

label: Revenue from sale of goods
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for revenue from sale of goods to related parties.

label: Reversal of impairment loss recognised in profit or loss
label_normalized: reversal of impairment loss recognised in profit or loss
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of reversal of impairment loss recognised in profit or loss.

label: Reversal of impairment loss on intangible assets other than goodwill
label_normalized: reversal of impairment loss on intangible assets other than goodwill
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the reversal of impairment loss on intangible assets other than goodwill. If the estimated recoverable amount of the asset exceeds its carrying amount, the entity shall increase the carrying amount to recoverable amount. That increase is a reversal of an impairment loss. The entity shall recognise the reversal immediately in profit or loss, unless the asset is carried at a revalued amount.

label: Reversal of impairment loss on property, plant and equipment
label_normalized: reversal of impairment loss on property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the reversal of impairment loss on property, plant and equipment. If the estimated recoverable amount of the asset exceeds its carrying amount, the entity shall increase the carrying amount to recoverable amount. That increase is a reversal of an impairment loss. The entity shall recognise the reversal immediately in profit or loss, unless the asset is carried at a revalued amount.

label: (Reversal of)/Impairment loss on inventories
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the reversal of impairment loss on inventories. An entity shall make a new assessment of selling price less costs to complete and sell at each subsequent reporting date. When the circumstances that previously caused inventories to be impaired no longer exist or when there is clear evidence of an increase in selling price less costs to complete and sell because of changed economic circumstances, the entity shall reverse the amount of the impairment (ie the reversal is limited to the amount of the original impairment loss) so that the new carrying amount is the lower of the cost and the revised selling price less costs to complete and sell.

label: Sales of property and other assets
label_normalized: sales of property and other assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for sale of property and other assets to related parties.

label: Services received
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for service received from related parties.

label: Share of profit (loss) of associates and joint ventures accounted for using equity method
label_normalized: share of profit (loss) of associates and joint ventures accounted for using equity method
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of share of profit or loss of associates and joint ventures in accordance to the proportion of shares owned by the reporting entity.

label: Loans and borrowings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of outstanding funds held that the reporting entity is obligated to repay to repay within a period of 12 months.

label: Short-term deposits
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of short term deposits. Deposit is the sum of money paid into a bank or building society account.

label: Short-term investments
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

label: Legal proceedings provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of present obligation as a result of a past obligating event - on the basis of the evidence available and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable.

label: Onerous contracts provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of a contract in which the unavoidable costs of meeting the obligations under the contract exceed the economic benefits expected to be received under it.

label: Restructuring provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of a programme that is planned and controlled by management and materially changes either the scope of a business undertaken by an entity or the manner in which that business is conducted.

label: Warranty provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the legal obligation as a result of the sale of the product with a warranty and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable for the warranties as a whole.

label: Social security contributions
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of social security contributions which are recognized as an expense in the year which the service are rendered by employees and the entity.

label: Termination benefits
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of termination benefits. Termination benefits are employee benefits payable as a result of either:i.  an entity’s decision to terminate an employee’s employment before the normal retirement date; orii. an employee’s decision to accept voluntary redundancy in exchange for those benefits.

label: Trade and other current payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of amount billed to a company by its suppliers for goods delivered to or services consumed by the company in the ordinary course of business and other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses.

label: Current trade payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current trade payables.

label: Trade and other current receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of amounts billed by the reporting entity to its customers when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business and  various forms of non-trade receivables which do not generally result from the operations of the business.

label: Trade and other payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount billed to a company by its suppliers for goods delivered to or services consumed by the company in the ordinary course of business and other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses.

label: Trade payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of trade payables.

label: Trade and other receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of  amounts billed by the reporting entity to its customers when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business and  various forms of nontrade receivables which do not generally result from the operations of the business.

label: Treasury shares
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amounts of the equity instruments of an entity that have been issued and subsequently reacquired by the entity.

label: Treasury shares [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing entity's own equity instruments which is held by the entity or other members of the consolidated group.

label: Vehicles

label: Work in progress

label: Others comprehensive income, net of tax, gains (losses) on other items
label_normalized: others comprehensive income, net of tax, gains (losses) on other items
