definition: Represents information pertaining to amount of accumulated fund as at the reporting date.

label: Accumulated funds (deficit) [member]
definition: Represents information pertaining to accumulated funds (deficit).

label: Allowance for doubtful debts
definition: Represents the amount of allowance for doubtful debts to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments for amortisation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of amortisation recognised as expenses during the period. Amortisation is the systematic allocation of the depreciable amount of an asset over its useful life.

label: Amortisation of government grants
definition: Represents the amount of amortisation of government grants to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in property development costs
label_normalized: adjustments for decrease (increase) in property development costs

label: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in property, plant and equipment written off
label_normalized: adjustments for decrease (increase) in property, plant and equipment written off
definition: Represents information pertaining to adjustments for decrease (increase) in property, plant and equipment written off.

label: Adjustment for depreciation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of depreciation recognised as expenses during the period. Depreciation is the systematic allocation of the depreciable amount of an asset over its useful life.

label: Adjustments for dividend income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for dividend income to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments for finance income

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of investment properties
label_normalized: (gain) loss on disposal of investment properties
definition: Represents the amount of gain (loss) on disposal of investment property to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments for other non-current assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the statement to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments for performance-based employee share scheme and other expenses
label_normalized: adjustments for performance-based employee share scheme and other expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for performance-based employee share scheme and other expenses to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. label: Adjustments for share of profit of equity-accounted associates and joint ventures, net of tax
label_normalized: adjustments for share of profit of equity-accounted associates and joint ventures, net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for share of equity-accounted associates and joint ventures post-tax profit to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.  An associate is an entity, including an unincorporated entity such as a partnership, over which the investor has significant influence and that is neither a subsidiary nor an interest in a joint venture.A joint venture is a contractual arrangement whereby two or more parties undertake an economic activity that is subject to joint control. Joint ventures can take the form of jointly controlled operations, jointly controlled assets or jointly controlled entities.

label: Adjustments for share of profits of joint ventures (net of tax)
label_normalized: adjustments for share of profits of joint ventures (net of tax)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for share of joint ventures post-tax profit to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. A joint venture is a joint arrangement whereby the parties that have joint control of the arrangement have rights to the net assets of the arrangement.

label: Adjustments for share option expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for share option expenses to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. Share-based payment arrangement is an agreement between the entity (or another group entity or any shareholder of any group entity) and another party (including an employee) that entitles the other party to receive

label: Adjustments for unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains)
label_normalized: adjustments for unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains)
definition: Represents the amount of unrealised foreign exchange gain (loss) to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Agent fees
definition: Represents the amount of expenses related to agent fees.

label: Aggregate Profit (loss)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss which is the total of income less expenses, excluding the components of other comprehensive income.

label: Aggregate profit (loss) before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of total profit or loss before tax.

label: Amortisation expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of amortisation expenses. The systematic allocation of the depreciable amount of an asset over its useful life.

label: Amortisation of deferred income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of amortization of deferred income such as grants. Grants which are related to income, are presented as part of profit or loss, either separately or under a general heading such as ‘Other income’; alternatively, they are deducted in reporting the related expense.

label: Other changes in amount of shares issued and fully paid
label_normalized: other changes in amount of shares issued and fully paid
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in shares issued and fully paid which are not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other changes in amount of shares issued but not fully paid
label_normalized: other changes in amount of shares issued but not fully paid
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in the amount of shares issued but not fully paid.

label: Amount of outstanding shares issued during financial year
label_normalized: amount of outstanding shares issued during financial year
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, the amount of shares issued during the financial year.

label: Arising from conversion of ICULS by mandatory conversion
label_normalized: arising from conversion of iculs by mandatory conversion

label: Arising from conversion of ICULS by surrender option
label_normalized: arising from conversion of iculs by surrender option

label: Amount of shares issued and fully paid, issued during the period
label_normalized: amount of shares issued and fully paid, issued during the period

label: Amount of shares issued and fully paid, outstanding
label_normalized: amount of shares issued and fully paid, outstanding
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares issued and fully paid.

label: Amount of shares issued but not fully paid
label_normalized: amount of shares issued but not fully paid
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the amount of shares issued but not fully paid.

label: Amount of shares issued but not fully paid, outstanding
label_normalized: amount of shares issued but not fully paid, outstanding
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares outstanding at the beginning of the period.

label: Issued for cash under ESOS
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued for cash under ESOS.

label: Issued for cash under private placement
label_normalized: issued for cash under private placement
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued for cash under private placement.

label: Amount of shares outstanding
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the amount of shares outstanding.

label: Assessment and quit rent
definition: Represents the amount of expenses related to assessment and quit rent.

label: Assets or disposal group classified as held for sale or as held for distribution to owners
label_normalized: assets or disposal group classified as held for sale or as held for distribution to owners
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of group of assets to be disposed of, by sale or otherwise, together as a group in a single transaction, and liabilities directly associated with those assets that will be transferred in the transaction. The group includes goodwill acquired in a business combination if the group is a cash-generating unit to which goodwill has been allocated or if it is an operation within such a cash-generating unit.

label: Assets other than assets held for sale
label_normalized: assets other than assets held for sale
definition: Represents information pertaining to assets other than assets held for sale.

label: Associates [Member]
definition: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing the  associates. An associate is an entity, including an unincorporated entity such as a partnership, over which the investor has significant influence and that is neither a subsidiary nor an interest in a joint venture.

label: Auditor's remuneration
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of auditor's remuneration.

label: Auditor's remuneration for audit services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of auditor's remuneration for audit services. Auditor's remuneration is the total amount paid to or receivable by the auditors as remuneration for their services as auditors, inclusive of all fees, percentages or other payments or consideration given by or from the reporting entity or by or from any subsidiary of the reporting entity.

label: Auditor's remuneration for other services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of auditor's remuneration for other services. Auditor's remuneration is the total amount paid to or receivable by the auditors as remuneration for their services as auditors, inclusive of all fees, percentages or other payments or consideration given by or from the reporting entity or by or from any subsidiary of the reporting entity.

label: Bad debts recovered
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of bad debts recovered. A debt incurred from a loan, a credit line, or an accounts receivable that is recovered either in whole or in part after it had been written off or classified by the entity as a bad debt.

label: Benefits-in-kind
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of benefits in kind which are allowances or additional compensation that are not included in the paycheck as wages, but carry financial value.

label: Bonus
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of wages, salaries, paid annual leave and sick leave, bonuses and non-monetary benefits which are accrued in the period in which the services are rendered by employees.

label: Bonus
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of bonus which are additional compensation given to directors above their normal salaries.

label: Gross brokerage and other charges
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from gross brokerage and other charges, which are the amount of commissions generated by brokers or registered representatives over a specific period.

label: Building on freehold land
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on permanent and absolute tenure of land with freedom to dispose of it at will.

label: Building on long term leasehold land
label_normalized: building on long term leasehold land
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on land held on long lease being a lease with an unexpired period of fifty years or more.

label: Building on short term leasehold land
label_normalized: building on short term leasehold land
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on land held on lease being a lease with an unexpired period of less than fifty years.

label: Capital from non-redeemable preference shares
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-redeemable shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

label: Capital from ordinary shares
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of ordinary share capital issued. An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

label: Capital from redeemable preference shares
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of redeemable shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

label: Capital reserve
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of reserves for long-term capital investment projects or other large and anticipated expenses that will be incurred in the future.

label: Capital reserve [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the reserves for long-term capital investment projects or other large and anticipated expenses that will be incurred in the future.

label: Cash at bank - Foreign
definition: Represents the amount of cash at bank held outside country by the entity.

label: Cash at bank - Local
definition: Represents the amount of cash at bank locally held by the entity.

label: Cash equivalents with other financial institutions
label_normalized: cash equivalents with other financial institutions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of cash equivalents which are short-term, highly liquid investments with other financial institutions that are readily convertible to known amounts of cash and which are subject to an insignificant risk of changes in value.

label: Cash generated from (used in) operations
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash generated from/(used in) operations.

definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments in relation to expense incurred from the issuance of perpetual sukuk.

definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of a share-based payment transaction in which the entity acquires goods or services by incurring a liability to transfer cash or other assets to the supplier of those goods or services for amounts that are based on the price (or value) of equity instruments (including shares or share options) of the entity or another group entity.

label: Changes in fund
definition: Represents information pertaining to changes in fund during the reporting period.

label: Charitable grants - Foreign
definition: Represents the amount of expenses related to foreign charitable grants.

label: Charitable grants - Local
definition: Represents the amount of expenses related to local charitable grants.

label: Components of fund [axis]
definition: Represents information pertaining to components of fund.

label: Components of fund [member]
definition: Represents information pertaining to type of components of fund.

label: Computer software and hardware
definition: Represents the amount of property, plant and equipment representing computer software and hardware held by the entity for use in operations.

label: Consolidation reserve
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the difference between the cost of acquisition and the nominal value of the share capital and reserves acquired.

label: Consolidation reserve [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the difference between the cost of acquisition and the nominal value of the share capital and reserves acquired.

label: Consolidation adjustments of retained earnings of subsidiaries, associates and joint ventures
label_normalized: consolidation adjustments of retained earnings of subsidiaries, associates and joint ventures
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the consolidation adjustments.

definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of contract revenue and contract costs related to contracts specifically negotiated for the construction of an asset or a combination of assets that are closely interrelated or interdependent in terms of their design, technology and function or their ultimate purpose or use.

label: Contribution from government
definition: Represents the amount of contribution from government classified as financing activities.

label: Contribution to zakat
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the zakat contribution during the reporting period. Zakat is a payment made annually under Islamic law on certain kinds of property and used for charitable and religious purposes.

label: Contributions by and distributions to owners
label_normalized: contributions by and distributions to owners
definition: Represents information pertaining to contributions by and distributions to owners during the reporting period.

label: Contribution from members
definition: Represents the amount of contributions from members as of reporting period.

label: Contributions or donations by foreign contributor
label_normalized: contributions or donations by foreign contributor
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the donations received from foreign contributors. Donations are things given to a charity, especially a sum of money.

label: Contributions or donations by local contributor
label_normalized: contributions or donations by local contributor
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the donations received from local contributors. Donations are things given to a charity, especially a sum of money.

label: Contributions or donations by unknown contributor
label_normalized: contributions or donations by unknown contributor
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the donations received from unknown contributors. Donations are things given to a charity, especially a sum of money.

label: Contributions to subsidiaries, net of impairment losses
label_normalized: contributions to subsidiaries, net of impairment losses
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contributions to subsidiaries which are amounts that entity does not expect repayment in the foreseeable future and are considered as part of the entity’s investment in the subsidiaries.

label: Cost of inventories
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the aggregate of all costs of purchase, costs of conversion and other costs incurred in bringing the inventories to their present location and condition.

label: Secured convertible notes
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of the current portion of current secured convertible notes.

label: Biological assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of current portion of biological asset which consist of living animal or plant.

label: Cash-settled share-based payment liability
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of a share-based payment transaction in which the entity acquires goods or services by incurring a liability to transfer cash or other assets to the supplier of those goods or services for amounts that are based on the price (or value) of equity instruments (including shares or share options) of the entity or another group entity.

label: Defined benefit plan
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans.

label: Defined contribution plan
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and has no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions or to make direct benefit payments to employees if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods.

label: Derivative financial assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of a contract that gives rise to a financial asset of one entity and a financial liability or equity instrument of another entity.

label: Current derivative financial assets at fair value through profit or loss
label_normalized: current derivative financial assets at fair value through profit or loss
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives at fair value through profit or loss.

label: Forward contract
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of informal agreements traded through a broker-dealer network to buy and sell derivative instruments, typically currency, at a specified price at a certain future date that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

label: Options
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of rights to buy or sell derivative instruments at a specified price within a set time that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

label: Other current derivative financial assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current derivatives financial assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Swap
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of exchange of assets between two borrowers, either so that each acquires access to funds in a currency they need or so that a fixed interest rate is exchanged for a floating rate that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

label: Derivative financial liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of contract that gives rise to a financial asset of one entity and a financial liability or equity instrument of another entity.

label: Current derivative financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss
label_normalized: current derivative financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives at fair value through profit or loss.

label: Forward contract
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of informal agreements traded through a broker-dealer network to buy and sell derivative instruments typically currency, at a specified price at a certain future date that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

label: Forward contract
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of informal agreements traded through a broker-dealer network to buy and sell derivative instruments typically currency, at a specified price at a certain future date used for hedging.

label: Options
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of rights to buy or sell derivative instruments at a specified price within a set time that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

label: Options
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of rights to buy or sell derivative instruments at a specified price within a set time used for hedging.

label: Other derivatives
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of other derivatives at fair value through profit or loss not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other derivatives
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other derivatives used for hedging not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Swap
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of exchange of liabilities between two borrowers, either so that each acquires access to funds in a currency they need or so that a fixed interest rate is exchanged for a floating rate that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

label: Swap
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of exchange of liabilities between two borrowers, either so that each acquires access to funds in a currency they need or so that a fixed interest rate is exchanged for a floating rate used for hedging.

label: Current derivative financial liabilities used for hedging
label_normalized: current derivative financial liabilities used for hedging
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives used for hedging.

label: Employment termination benefits

label: Other investments
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

label: Accruals
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of expenses that have been incurred but are not yet recorded in the accounts.

label: Deferred income
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of advance payments for products or services that are to be delivered in the future.

label: Deposits and advanced billings
definition: Represents the amount of current non-trade deposits and advanced billings.

label: Dividend payable
definition: Represents the amount of current non-trade dividend payables.

label: Financing costs
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of borrowing costs which refers to interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds.

label: Interest payables
definition: Represents the amount of current non-trade interest payables.

label: Current non-trade payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current non-trade payables.

label: Retention payable
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of payment for a service or product that is withheld pending the completion of some specified condition.

label: Other derivatives
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of other derivatives at fair value through profit or loss not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other current employee  benefits
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current employee benefits not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Finance lease liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of finance lease liabilities.

label: Loan from holding company
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of  loan to the reporting entity by its holding company.

label: Loan from other related companies
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of loan from other related companies for a specific amount that has a specified repayment schedule and a fixed or floating interest rate.

label: Secured bank overdrafts
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of the current portion of current secured bank overdrafts.

label: Bankers' acceptance
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured bills of exchange drawn on and accepted by a bank in Malaysia.

label: Hire purchase and finance lease liabilities
label_normalized: hire purchase and finance lease liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured hire purchase and finance lease liabilities.

label: Islamic financing facilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured Islamic financing facilities.

label: Islamic medium term notes
definition: Represents the amount of current portion of non-current secured islamic medium term notes.

label: Other secured bank facilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of other secured bank facilities not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

definition: Represents the amount of current portion of non-current secured revolvig credit and notes.

definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured sukuk which are certificates of equal value which evidence undivided ownership or investment in the assets using Shariah principles and concepts endorsed by the Shariah Committee.

label: Term loans

label: Employee benefits expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of employee benefits expenses. Employee benefits are all forms of consideration given by an entity in exchange for service rendered by employees, including directors and management.

label: Share option expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of share option expense. A share-based payment transaction in which the entity: a. receives goods or services as consideration for its own equity instruments (including shares or share options); or b. receives goods or services but has no obligation to settle the transaction with the supplier.

label: Employment termination benefits
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of employee benefits payable as a result of either: a. an entity’s decision to terminate an employee’s employment before the normal retirement date; or b. an employee’s decision to accept voluntary redundancy in exchange for those benefits.

label: Energy costs
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of costs of power derived from the utilization of physical or chemical resources, especially to provide light and heat or to work machines.

label: Entertainment expenses
definition: Represents the amount of expenses related to entertainment.

label: Equity balance restated
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of components of equity considered as opening balances after taking into account the impact of changes in accounting policies in current reporting period. Equity is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities.

label: Equity component of Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stocks (ICULS)
label_normalized: equity component of irredeemable convertible unsecured loan stocks (iculs)
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of equity component of Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stocks (ICULS).Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stocks (ICULS) is a type of security that can be used to purchase underlying common shares. It is similar to a warrant except that it is subject to the conversion ratio.

label: Equity component of preference shares
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

label: Equity components of other financial instruments
label_normalized: equity components of other financial instruments

label: Expenditure

label: Share-based compensation expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of share-based compensation expense. A share-based payment transaction in which the entity: a. receives goods or services as consideration for its own equity instruments (including shares or share options); or b. receives goods or services but has no obligation to settle the transaction with the supplier.

label: Explanation of reasons for the reclassification of previous financial statements figures [textblock]
label_normalized: explanation of reasons for the reclassification of previous financial statements figures
definition: Represents information pertaining to explanation of reasons for the reclassification of previous financial statements figures of the entity. When the presentation or classification of items in the financial statements is changed, an entity shall reclassify comparative amounts unless the reclassification is impracticable. When comparative amounts are reclassified, an entity shall disclose the following: a. the nature of the reclassification; b. the amount of each item or class of items that is reclassified; and c. the reason for the reclassification.

label: Explanation of reasons for the restatement of previous financial statements figures [textblock]
label_normalized: explanation of reasons for the restatement of previous financial statements figures
definition: Represents information pertaining to explanation of reasons for the restatement of previous financial statements figures of the entity. An entity shall disclose the following about prior period errors: a. the nature of the prior period error; b. for each prior period presented, to the extent practicable, the amount of the correction for each financial statement line item affected; c. to the extent practicable, the amount of the correction at the beginning of the earliest prior period presented; and d. an explanation if it is not practicable to determine the amounts to be disclosed in (b) or (c).

label: Explanation of reasons for using longer or shorter reporting period [textblock]
label_normalized: explanation of reasons for using longer or shorter reporting period
definition: Represents information pertaining to explanation of reasons for using longer or shorter reporting period of the entity. An entity shall present a complete set of financial statements at least annually. When the end of an entity’s reporting period changes and the annual financial statements are presented for a period longer or shorter than one year, the entity shall disclose the following: a. that fact; b. the reason for using a longer or shorter period; and c. the fact that comparative amounts presented in the financial statements (including the related notes) are not entirely comparable.

definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the difference, if any, between the carrying amount of the assets distributed and the carrying amount of the dividend payable in profit or loss when entities settle the dividend payable.

label: Gain on disposal of associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the gain on disposal of associates. If an investor loses significant influence over an associate as a result of a full or partial disposal, it shall derecognise that associate and recognise in profit or loss the difference between, on the one hand, the sum of the proceeds received plus the fair value of any retained interest and, on the other hand, the carrying amount of the investment in the associate at the date significant influence is lost.

label: Gain on disposal of joint ventures
label_normalized: gain on disposal of joint ventures
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the difference between the proceeds from the disposal and the carrying amount of the investment in joint venture. A joint venture is a contractual arrangement whereby two or more parties undertake an economic activity that is subject to joint control. Joint ventures can take the form of jointly controlled operations, jointly controlled assets or jointly controlled entities.

label: Gain on disposal of subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the difference between the proceeds from the disposal of the subsidiary and its carrying amount at the date that control is lost is recognised in profit or loss in the consolidated statement of comprehensive income (or the income statement, if presented) as gain on the disposal of the subsidiary.

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of (gain) loss on disposal of associates to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of joint ventures
label_normalized: (gain) loss on disposal of joint ventures
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of (gain) loss on disposal of joint ventures to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of other investments
label_normalized: (gain) loss on disposal of other investments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or loss on disposal of other investments not reported elsewhere in the statement to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of (gain) loss on disposal of subsidiaries to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of investment properties
label_normalized: (gain) loss on disposal of investment properties
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of gain (loss) on disposal of investment properties recognised as income/(expense) during the period. Investment property is property (land or a building, or part of a building, or both) held by the owner or by the lessee under a finance lease to earn rentals or for capital appreciation or both, instead of for: a. use in the production or supply of goods or services or for administrative purposes; or b. sale in the ordinary course of business

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of property, plant and equipment
label_normalized: (gain) loss on disposal of property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of gain (loss)  on disposal of property, plant and equipment recognised as income/(expense) during the period.Property, plant and equipment are tangible assets that:a. are held for use in the production or supply of goods or services, for rental to others or for administrative purposes; and b. are expected to be used during more than one period.

label: Gain on disposal from other investments
label_normalized: gain on disposal from other investments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the gain on disposal from other investments. An interest in another entity refers to contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

label: Gain from disposal of a subsidiary, joint ventures and associates
label_normalized: gain from disposal of a subsidiary, joint ventures and associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of gain on disposal of subsidiaries, associates and joint ventures.

label: Gains on disposal of other non-current assets
label_normalized: gains on disposal of other non-current assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains on disposal of other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Gain on disposals of property, plant and equipment
label_normalized: gain on disposals of property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the gain on disposal of property, plant and equipment for which an entity shall determine the gain or loss arising from the derecognition of an item of property, plant and equipment as the difference between the net disposal proceeds, if any, and the carrying amount of the item.

label: Gains on foreign exchange
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of gain on foreign exchange.

label: Government contribution
definition: Represents the amount of government contribution received by the entity.

If it will or may be settled in the issuer’s own equity instruments, it is:I. a non-derivative that includes no contractual obligation or the issuer to deliver a variable number of its own equity instruments; orii. a derivative that will be settled by the issuer exchanging a fixed amount of cash or another financial asset for a fixed number of its own equity instruments. They are recognized as assets of the operator, measured at fair value on initial recognition.

label: Service concession liability

If such assets form part of the consideration payable by the grantor for the services, they are not government grants. They are recognized as assets of the operator, measured at fair value on initial recognition.
